evals.prompt: 围绕‘一家本地餐饮品牌准备开第二家店’这个主题，写一篇适合微信公众号发布的中文文章。不要写成招商软文，要更像老板写给老顾客看的真心话。最后给我一个可发草稿箱的标题和 HTML 结构建议。
evals.expected_output: Should follow the user-chosen business topic, keep a公众号-friendly tone, produce a strong Chinese title, and generate HTML-ready article guidance.

evals.prompt: 我给你 3 个链接，主题是亲子教育，不要逐条翻译，帮我揉成一篇公众号短稿。要求开头两句就把家长钩住，一句话一段，结尾告诉读者现在最值得做的一个动作。
evals.expected_output: Should synthesize multiple sources into one article instead of doing link-by-link summaries, stay on the parenting topic, keep short paragraphs, and end with practical action advice.

evals.prompt: 根据一场新品发布会的素材，写一篇适合公众号的中文评论稿，重点不是复述参数，而是告诉普通消费者这东西到底值不值得关注。如果适合发草稿箱，也请给出后续发布步骤。
evals.expected_output: Should prioritize meaning over raw specs, explain impact for normal readers, stay aligned with the user-selected product topic, and mention draft-creation workflow when appropriate.
